abilities.name: Pigcharge
abilities.description: May perform (2) Charge Action as (1) Action.

abilities.name: Set Er Off
abilities.description: At start of turn during Dramatic Time, if not engaged or within 2 yards of friendly without this Ability, must declare Charge vs closest legal non-Pig target.

abilities.name: Eat Like A Pig
abilities.description: After killing Living/Undead with Close Combat attack, may immediately end turn to heal 3 damage.

actions: (1) Tusks (Pugilism) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Must declare Trigger. Ram Stampede: After damaging, must declare Charge vs closest non-Pig not engaged. Crow Eat Anything: After damaging Living/Undead, heal 1. Tome Tossed Up: After succeeding, place target 2 yards away, becomes Prone. Mask Trampling: Target TN 12 Acrobatics or suffers 1 damage, Prone.
system.notes: Voracious killing machines. Thick leather skin and massive tusks. Knock adult humans down. Wild pigs kept Gremlin population culled. Now Gremlins hunt and domesticate them.
